summary: Payroll Analytics dashboard testing completed successfully. All 5 backend analytics endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend Analytics page fully functional with comprehensive charts, real data visualization, and proper authentication integration.
passed_tests: Analytics Summary API - Returns correct totals with all required fields
Payroll Trends API - Returns historical payroll data over 12 periods
Deductions Breakdown API - Returns CPP, EI, Federal Tax, Provincial Tax breakdown
Employee Costs API - Returns per-employee cost breakdown from latest run
Cost Forecast API - Returns annual projections with monthly and yearly data
Analytics page renders all 4 summary cards with real data values
Payroll Trends chart displays area chart with gross/net pay over time
Deductions Breakdown displays pie chart with proper color coding and values
Employee Cost Distribution displays horizontal bar chart by employee
Annual Cost Forecast displays projected costs and breakdowns
Navigation to Analytics page works correctly
Authentication protection working (redirects to login when unauthenticated)
Mobile responsiveness - charts and cards adapt to mobile viewport
Login flow integration successful with admin credentials
Data integration between backend APIs and frontend charts working perfectly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (15/15 features working)
